ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the employee works */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account of the employee */,
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment type of the employee */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the employee */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the employee */,
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "job_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started their current job */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee's employment was terminated */,
  "reason_for_termination" TEXT /* Reason for the employee's termination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_employment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_type_id") REFERENCES employment_types ("employment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_employment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status_id") REFERENCES employment_statuses ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "minimum_salary" INTEGER /* Minimum salary for the position */,
  "maximum_salary" INTEGER /* Maximum salary for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "base_salary" INTEGER /* Base salary of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary takes effect */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the salary ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment type */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided for the employment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the employee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statuses" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee's employment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., department administrator, HR personnel) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "job_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the employee worked */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended the job */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the employee was promoted */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was promoted */,
  "reason_for_promotion" TEXT /* Reason for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the employee's performance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the employee's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_and_development" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the training started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the training ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_and_development_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
